rulings.Case Title: HOUSING CORPORATION INC et al VS. DOUGLAS MCNIE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Douglas Mcnie Dba Mcgregor Communications' Motion, As The Prevailing Party, To Recover Attorneys' Fees From Plaintiff Scott Robertson
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 15, 2008, line 10, Defendant Douglas Mcnie Dba Mcgregor Communications' Motion, As The Prevailing Party, To Recover Attorneys' Fees From Plaintiff Scott Robertson. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AWARDING DEFENDANT $14,350. THE COURT HAS REDUCED THE REQUEST TO ADDRESS INEFFICIENCIES, AND THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: GARRETT VAN WAGONER VS. CARREN SUE SHAGLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: X-Defts Wagoner 'S Ntc Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 15, 2008, line 12, CROSS-DEFENDANTS GARRETT WAGONER AND LORI WAGONER'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings IS DENIED. THE 7/24/07 LISTING AGREEMENT IDENTIFIES THE BROKER ON THE SIGNATURE LINE. ANY AMBIGUITY MAY BE CURED BY REFERENCE TO THE AGENCY DISCLOSURE SIGNED THE SAME DAY. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: GARRETT VAN WAGONER VS. CARREN SUE SHAGLEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For X-Complaiant Carren Sue Shagley For Leave To File First Amended X-Complaint To Add An Indispensable Party
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 15, 2008, line 12, Motion For Cross-Complainant Carren Sue Shagley For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint To Add An Indispensable Party IS GRANTED. JOINDER IS PERMISSIBLE UNDER CCP SECTION 378. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CRYSTAL LEI VS. AUGUSTINE FALLAY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, December 15, 2008, line 4, DEFENDANT AUGUSTINE FALLAY'S Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S EXPLANATION FOR FAILING TO RESPOND TO THE COMPLAINT DOES NOT CONSTITUTE EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. =(302/PJM/JW)
